statement: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled.
author: Plutarch (attrib. in Emerson)
primary_source: Plutarch, 'On Listening to Lectures' — cited via Emerson 'On the American Scholar' (1837); Plutarch PD
verified_via: Plutarch Moralia; Emerson 1837; NOT misattributed to Rabelais in this form
